name: merkur-monorepo
description: Merkur is library for creating micro frontend with server side rendering.

scripts.commit: echo 'This command has been replaced with "npm run changeset"' && npm run changeset
scripts.release: npm run release:prepare && npm run release:push
scripts.release:prepare: npm run check:uncommitted:changes && changeset version && node utils/bumpVersion.js && node utils/copyReadme.js && node utils/syncRootChangelog.js && npm i --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts
scripts.release:push: git add . && git commit -m 'release: publish' && node utils/createRootTag.js && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:graduate: npm run check:uncommitted:changes && changeset pre exit && changeset version && node utils/bumpVersion.js && node utils/copyReadme.js && node utils/syncRootChangelog.js && npm i --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts
scripts.check:uncommitted:changes: test "`git status . --porcelain`" && echo 'There are uncommitted changes. Aborting release.' && exit 1 || exit 0

author: Miroslav Jancarik <miroslav.jancarik@firma.seznam.cz>
